SEARCH
Package com.berryrock.integrationhub.model

Class AddressMatchResult

java.lang.Object
com.berryrock.integrationhub.model.AddressMatchResult
public class AddressMatchResult extends Object
Captures the outcome of attempting to match a single address across systems. Part of the address pipeline — produced after the matching phase and used to track which records were successfully correlated between Salesforce, the Loan Tape (Google Sheets), and Buildium. The matchSource field records which system initiated the match and which pass (full key or address-only fallback) was used.

  • Constructor Details

    • AddressMatchResult

      public AddressMatchResult()
      Constructs an empty result.

  • Method Details

    • isMatched

      public boolean isMatched()
      Returns whether a match was found.
      Returns:
      true if matched

    • setMatched

      public void setMatched(boolean matched)
      Sets the matched flag.
      Parameters:
      matched - true if a match was found

    • getNormalizedKey

      public String getNormalizedKey()
      Returns the normalized composite key used during matching.
      Returns:
      pipe-delimited key, or null if not set

    • setNormalizedKey

      public void setNormalizedKey(String normalizedKey)
      Sets the normalized key.
      Parameters:
      normalizedKey - pipe-delimited key from the normalization step

    • getSalesforceOpportunityId

      public String getSalesforceOpportunityId()
      Returns the Salesforce Opportunity ID of the matched record.
      Returns:
      Opportunity ID, or null if no SF match was found

    • setSalesforceOpportunityId

      public void setSalesforceOpportunityId(String salesforceOpportunityId)
      Sets the Salesforce Opportunity ID.
      Parameters:
      salesforceOpportunityId - Opportunity ID from Salesforce

    • getSheetRowNumber

      public Integer getSheetRowNumber()
      Returns the 1-based row number in the Google Sheet that was matched.
      Returns:
      sheet row number, or null if no sheet match was found

    • setSheetRowNumber

      public void setSheetRowNumber(Integer sheetRowNumber)
      Sets the sheet row number.
      Parameters:
      sheetRowNumber - 1-based row index in the spreadsheet

    • getBuildiumPropertyId

      public String getBuildiumPropertyId()
      Returns the Buildium property ID of the matched unit.
      Returns:
      Buildium property ID, or null if no Buildium match was found

    • setBuildiumPropertyId

      public void setBuildiumPropertyId(String buildiumPropertyId)
      Sets the Buildium property ID.
      Parameters:
      buildiumPropertyId - Buildium property ID of the matched unit

    • getMatchSource

      public String getMatchSource()
      Returns a description of which systems and which matching pass produced this result.
      Returns:
      match source label, or null if not set

    • setMatchSource

      public void setMatchSource(String matchSource)
      Sets the match source description.
      Parameters:
      matchSource - human-readable label for the matching pass

    • getWarning

      public String getWarning()
      Returns any warning associated with this result (e.g., ambiguous Buildium match).
      Returns:
      warning message, or null if no warning

    • setWarning

      public void setWarning(String warning)
      Sets the warning message.
      Parameters:
      warning - description of any data quality issue or ambiguity
